forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 54. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 66, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 6 to 13 mph.

weather_report:
As the early hours of Friday usher in a gently shifting ambiance across Downtown San Francisco, the low murmur of the southwest wind hints at the brighter promises of the day ahead. Though the night still holds sway, with the air wrapped in a cool embrace around 54 degrees, the clouds above take on a softer edge, suggesting that the sun will soon weave its golden threads into the fabric of the city. As the morning unfolds, glimpses of blue will begin to punctuate the gray, heralding a promising high of 66. Nonetheless, the lingering touch of the marine layer may veil the horizon, whispering of summer's close proximity while soothing the city with a coolness that mingles with the warmth of day.

In this gentle weather, prepare yourself for the gradual embrace of the afternoon sun but wrap up in layers for your walks amid the streets, perhaps opting for a light sweater or cardigan, perfect for the lulls of intermittent breeze. The day invites an array of simple pleasures; a stroll along the Embarcadero would be splendid, as the invigorating bay air revitalizes the spirit, or perhaps a leisurely exploration of the lively farmers’ market, where local flavors abound. Embrace the little moments, as today ushers in an inviting, albeit cautious joy—a quintessential San Francisco summer day unfolding in a city masterfully nestled between fog and sunshine.
